figures_detected.associated_step: Checking Brake Booster, Vacuum Hoses, Connections and Check Valve

content_blocks.text: Checking Brake Fluid Level and Leaks
If fluid level is extremely low, check brake system for leaks, and brake pads for wear.
Check brake fluid lines and parking brake cables for improper attachment, leaks, chafing, abrasion, deterioration, etc.

steps.text: Drain brake fluid from each air bleeder valve.
Refill until new brake fluid comes out from each air bleeder valve. Use same procedure as in bleeding hydraulic system to refill brake fluid.

content_blocks.text: Be careful not to splash brake fluid on painted areas.
Checking Brake Booster, Vacuum Hoses, Connections and Check Valve
Check vacuum lines, connections and check valve for improper attachment, air tightness, chafing and deterioration.
